items.title: You're visible on Google but not on AI search.
items.description: ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE are where B2B buyers start their research. If your brand isn't in those answers, the deal starts without you.

items.title: Traffic is growing but revenue isn't.
items.description: The average B2B SaaS with proper CRO converts at 4–6%. If you're at 1–2%, that gap is qualified pipeline you're leaving for competitors. Traffic without conversion is just vanity.

items.title: You have 3 vendors running 3 separate playbooks.
items.description: SEO with one agency. CRO with another. Nobody owns AEO. Nothing connects. Nothing compounds. You're paying for execution but not getting a strategy.

approach.title: Growth Autopilot is a system. Not a service package.
approach.intro: Most agencies sell you deliverables: blog posts, backlinks, a redesign. We build an integrated growth engine where SEO feeds AEO visibility, and AEO-optimised content feeds CRO. Each layer compounds the one before it.

layers.title: SEO
layers.description: Technical foundation, content architecture, and keyword strategy built for pipeline — not vanity metrics.

layers.title: AEO
layers.description: AI Engine Optimisation. Making your brand the answer when buyers ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Google SGE who solves their problem.

layers.title: CRO
layers.description: Conversion rate optimisation on every page that matters — turning qualified traffic into booked demos and pipeline.

items.name: Base Autopilot
items.tagline: One focused track. Right for teams who need to move on a single clear priority.
features: Choose one track: Webflow Build or SEO/AEO Growth

items.tagline: System designed for B2B SaaS teams who need the revenue pipeline moving.

items.name: Scale Autopilot
items.tagline: Full multi-track execution for companies running 3+ growth initiatives. Multi-stakeholder governance, priority handling, and the highest throughput.

caseStudies.title: Results from B2B teams we've grown.
caseStudies.subtitle: Only Tier 1 B2B Tech and SaaS references. No vanity case studies.

items.description: A single conversion-optimised landing page, built and shipped with the right messaging architecture. $200,000 in sales closed within 30 days of launch. The only change was the page.
B2B health-tech SaaS. Systematic CRO across key conversion pages — positioning overhaul, trust architecture, and copy restructuring. Nearly 3x the conversion rate from the same traffic.

B2B SaaS cybersecurity. Full WordPress to Webflow migration with SEO rebuilt from the ground up. 20+ pages launched on a compressed timeline without SEO loss — and with significant organic gains post-migration.

Fintech and B2B SaaS messaging repositioning. When positioning is unclear, traffic doesn't convert. We rebuilt the messaging architecture and site design so the value prop landed — and buyers knew immediately if it was for them.

audit.title: Start with a free AI Visibility Audit.
audit.description: We'll check whether your brand is showing up in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE when your buyers are actively searching for what you offer. Delivered as a detailed Loom walkthrough.
checks: Are you mentioned when buyers search your category in ChatGPT and Perplexity?
Schema and structured data issues blocking AI search indexing
Competitive AI visibility gap — how you compare to 3 direct competitors
3 highest-impact fixes you can act on immediately

items.question: How is this different from hiring separate SEO, AEO, and CRO agencies?
items.answer: Most companies run three separate vendors with three separate playbooks. Nothing connects. Nothing compounds. Growth Autopilot integrates all three disciplines into a single system where SEO feeds AEO visibility, and AEO-optimised content feeds CRO. One team, one strategy, one Scoreboard.

items.question: What kind of companies is this for?
items.answer: B2B SaaS and tech companies, typically $1M–$50M ARR, who have a website that should be generating pipeline but isn't. If your growth metrics and your pipeline don't match, Growth Autopilot is built for you.

items.question: What does the free AI Visibility Audit include?
items.answer: We manually check whether your brand is being cited in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE when buyers search your category. You get a detailed Loom walkthrough covering your current AI visibility, competitive gaps, schema issues, and 3 actionable fixes. No automated tool — done personally by our founder.

items.question: How long before I see results?
items.answer: Quick wins — headline, CTA, and above-the-fold improvements — can move numbers within the first 30 days. SEO and AEO gains compound over 90-day cycles. We set clear goals at the start and report against them weekly.

items.question: Do I need to manage anything?
items.answer: No. We own the roadmap, prioritization, execution, and reporting. You get a single point of contact, regular syncs, and a shared Scoreboard. Zero task management on your end.

items.question: Can I start with one track and expand later?
items.answer: Yes. The Base Autopilot tier gives you one focused track — either Webflow Build or SEO/AEO Growth. You can upgrade to Growth Autopilot Plus or Scale Autopilot at any time as your needs grow.

cta.title: Pipeline that compounds.
